description: Case style: Stainless steel rectangular case with crystal embellishmentsDial style: Silver dial with silver hands Strap style: White genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Ssteele branding on the 12 hour mark, Maxima branding on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time  Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showeringWarranty: 1 year
